name: Organic Trust Retreat — Richmond's Premier Wellness Club
greeting: Hi! I'm the Organic Trust Retreat — Richmond's Premier Wellness Club assistant. How can I help you today?

RICHMOND'S PREMIER WELLNESS RETREAT
Where Nature Meets Performance.
An adult-only sanctuary for those who refuse to compromise. Exceptional fitness, restorative spa, and fine dining — set within twelve acres of private grounds.

=== https://www.organictrust.co.uk/about ===
RICHMOND, SURREY
About & Contact
OUR STORY
Built for a Different Standard.
Organic Trust Retreat was founded in 2012 by Dr. James Calloway, a former sports physician who had spent twenty years watching clients achieve results in environments that were entirely inadequate for them — crowded, impersonal, and built around volume rather than quality. He believed something different was possible.
Starting with a Victorian coach house set within twelve acres of private grounds on the south bank of the Thames in Richmond, he spent three years transforming the estate into what would become Surrey's most sought-after wellness destination. The performance facility, spa, and restaurant were built simultaneously, on the principle that genuine wellness could not be siloed.
Today, Organic Trust Retreat limits its membership deliberately — not as a commercial strategy, but because the quality of every visit depends on it. We are an adult-only club. We do not compromise on the standard of our people, our equipment, or our environment.
Opening Hours
Monday – Thursday	06:00 – 22:00
Friday	06:00 – 21:00
Saturday – Sunday	08:00 – 18:00
Restaurant daily	08:30 – 17:00
Bank holiday hours may vary. Please check our social media or call ahead.

Our People
HEAD OF WELLNESS & GROUP EXERCISE
Charlotte Mills
Charlotte joined Organic Trust in 2018 as a yoga and Pilates instructor and has since built one of the most respected group fitness programmes in the South East. With qualifications spanning Pilates, barre, aqua fitness and personal training, her philosophy centres on making elite movement genuinely accessible — for all ages, all starting points, and all goals.
Why Work With Us
✓
Complimentary full facility access
✓
Generous discounts on treatments and dining
✓
Friends and family guest passes
✓
Funded qualifications through our in-house training programme
✓
Clear pathways for career development and promotion
VIEW CURRENT VACANCIES
Frequently Asked Questions
Is Organic Trust Retreat open to non-members?
The retreat is primarily a members-only club. However, spa day packages, restaurant dining and selected events are available to non-members. Contact us to discuss guest and day visitor arrangements.
What is the minimum age?
All membership categories are strictly 18 and over. We are an adult-only facility throughout — including the restaurant, spa and grounds. Valid ID may be requested at any time.
Is there a joining fee?
Current promotion: no joining fee on 3-month or 12-month memberships. Our no-commitment monthly membership carries a one-time £100 joining fee. Speak to our team for the latest offer.
Can I bring guests?
Monthly members receive one guest pass per month. 3-Month members receive two, and 12-Month members receive four. Guests must be accompanied at all times and are subject to the same age policy.
Is parking available?
We have forty on-site parking spaces available free of charge to members. Overflow parking is available on Petersham Road. Richmond station is a five-minute walk.
Are there changing facilities?
Yes — luxury changing rooms with individual lockers, rainfall showers and full grooming amenities. Annual members receive a permanently assigned locker.
Can I freeze my membership?
Memberships may be frozen for medical reasons or extended travel for up to eight weeks per year with reasonable notice. Please speak with our membership team.
Do you offer corporate memberships?
Yes. We have a tailored corporate programme for companies supporting employee wellbeing. Please contact us for rates and terms.

=== https://www.organictrust.co.uk/gym ===
PERFORMANCE TRAINING
Gym & Fitness
THE PERFORMANCE FLOOR
Engineered Around You.
Our training facility has been designed from the ground up to support every type of athlete — from the complete beginner to the competitive sportsperson. Twelve thousand square feet across two floors, equipped with the finest performance brands and maintained to an elite standard.
Every new member receives a complimentary sixty-minute onboarding session with a personal trainer and a baseline body composition scan. From there, your programme is entirely your own.
🏋️
Two complimentary PT sessions in your first month
📊
Monthly body composition analysis with digital report
⚙️
Technogym Free Weights & Strength equipment
🔄
Matrix Resistance Machines covering every muscle group
🏃
Full cardiovascular suite and functional training zones
📱
Reynolds-compatible app integration for tracking
The Facilities
Cardiovascular Suite
Free Weights & Strength
Resistance Machines
Functional Training Zone
Studios
Recovery Zone
Twenty pieces of cardio equipment including Technogym treadmills with entertainment screens, upright and recumbent bikes, cross-trainers, stair climbers and ski ergs.
Each machine programmed with heart rate monitoring, built-in workout programmes and Bluetooth connectivity; floor-to-ceiling windows with garden views.
Precision Biometric Analysis
Every membership includes a monthly body composition scan using our Seca medical-grade bioelectrical impedance system. Results are delivered to your phone within the hour and include muscle mass distribution, body fat percentage, visceral fat level, metabolic age, hydration status and segmental balance.
Your trainer reviews results with you each month and adjusts your programme accordingly. Track your progress longitudinally over months and years — the clearest picture you'll ever have of your body's response to training.
—
Muscle mass (segmental and total)
—
Body fat % (segmental and total)
—
Visceral fat level
—
Hydration status
—
Metabolic age
—
Lean vs fat mass ratio
—
Left-right balance
—
Phase angle (cell health marker)
1-TO-1 COACHING
Personal Training
Our trainers are selected through one of the most rigorous recruitment processes in the industry. Every coach holds at minimum a Level 3 personal training qualification alongside specialist certifications in at least two additional disciplines — strength and conditioning, sports rehabilitation, nutritional strategy, pre- and post-natal training, or mental performance coaching.

✓

✓

What Sets Our Trainers Apart
✓
All hold Level 4 or above (master trainer level)
✓
Minimum three years client-facing experience
✓
Ongoing CPD funded by the retreat
✓
Capped client roster to ensure full availability
✓
Deep familiarity with the facility and full scheduling flexibility

=== https://www.organictrust.co.uk/spa ===
RESTORATION & RENEWAL
Spa & Wellness
THE SPA SANCTUARY
Complete Restoration.
The Organic Trust Spa was designed to give the restorative experience equal billing with the performance experience. Spanning eight thousand square feet across two floors, the spa is built on a simple principle: once you step through the doors, the outside world ceases to exist.
The thermal journey moves through contrast therapy, hydrotherapy, relaxation and finally treatment — designed to be undertaken at your own pace with no time pressure and no noise. Our therapists are among the most skilled in the country, hand-selected for their clinical expertise and their ability to truly listen.
🌡️
Full thermal suite access daily
💆
Eight private treatment rooms
🏊
Heated infinity and hydrotherapy pools
💅
Dedicated nail and beauty suite
🍃
Comfort Zone skincare throughout
🎁
Gift vouchers available year-round
What's Included
✓
Luxury robe and towel on arrival
✓
Personalised treatment slippers
✓
Full access to the thermal suite
✓
Use of both heated pools
✓
Relaxation lounge access with refreshments
✓
Seasonal light menu at The Garden Table restaurant
The Spa Facilities
Thermal Suite
Treatment Rooms
Nail Suite
Infinity Pool
Hydrotherapy Pool
Relaxation Lounge
The Garden Table (Spa)
Finnish sauna at 85°C with eucalyptus-infused air; herbal steam room with chromotherapy lighting; laconium (Roman-style gentle heat room) for extended relaxation; heated tile loungers and footbaths.
Ice fountain and cold plunge pool at 10°C for contrast therapy; all thermal facilities included with membership and spa day packages.
OUR SKINCARE PARTNER
Comfort Zone Professional
All treatments at the Organic Trust Spa are performed using Comfort Zone Professional — an Italian skincare brand built on rigorous clinical research, conscious formulations, and a philosophy of skin as an ecosystem rather than a surface. Every product is vegan-certified, free from mineral oils and parabens, and developed in collaboration with dermatologists.
Our therapists undergo Comfort Zone-specific training twice yearly, ensuring that your treatment is not only relaxing but genuinely transformative for your skin. A personalised product recommendation is included with every facial.
Book Your Spa Experience
VIEW SPA DAY PACKAGES
BROWSE TREATMENTS
BUY GIFT VOUCHERS

=== https://www.organictrust.co.uk/restaurant ===
FINE DINING
The Garden Table
Our Menus
🍽️
Seasonal Menu
Chef's selection of modern British dishes, updated with the seasons. Breakfast, lunch and dinner served daily.
VIEW MENU
🫖
Afternoon Tea Menu
Our signature afternoon tea, served daily from 14:00. Classic, indulgent and entirely made in-house.
VIEW MENU

Drinks List
A curated list of wines, champagnes, cocktails and spirits, including our own Organic Trust signature serve.
VIEW MENU
Menus are updated seasonally. Please speak to our team for the current full menu or any dietary requirements.
IN THE KITCHEN
Head Chef Daniel Ashworth
Daniel joined Organic Trust Retreat in 2019 having previously led kitchens at two Michelin-recommended restaurants in London and a private members club in Mayfair. His food is rooted in British seasonality — honest, precise, ingredient-led — and he works directly with a network of local farms, market gardens and foragers to produce a menu that changes not just with the season but with the week's best produce. Every breakfast, lunch and dinner service at The Garden Table reflects his belief that food at a wellness retreat should nourish as much as it should delight.
DAILY FROM 14:00
Afternoon Tea
Our afternoon tea has become one of the retreat's most beloved rituals — unhurried, generous and prepared entirely by our kitchen team using the finest seasonal ingredients. Served daily between 14:00 and 17:30.
—
Hand-cut finger sandwiches: smoked salmon, cucumber and cream cheese, egg mayonnaise and cress, coronation chicken
—
Warm plain and fruit scones with Organic Trust clotted cream and seasonal preserve
—
Patisserie selection (four miniatures) chosen by the kitchen each day
—
Miniature cakes: lemon drizzle, Victoria sponge, pistachio financier, seasonal feature
—
Full loose-leaf tea selection with over twenty varieties
—
Optional Bollinger champagne upgrade (glass or bottle)

Members Hub
Your Member Benefits
🌿
20% Off Spa Treatments
Present your membership card at any treatment booking. Valid seven days a week on all listed treatments and spa day packages.
🍽️
15% Off Dining
Available at The Garden Table for all food and non-alcoholic drinks. Valid for you and up to three guests per visit.
⭐
Priority Class Booking
Open your class booking window 48 hours before non-members, ensuring you never miss your favourite session. Manage via the app.
Personal Training
Our personal trainers are available seven days a week and can be booked in single sessions or packages. All programmes are built around your body composition data, lifestyle, and goals. Your assigned trainer will stay with you for the duration of your package, ensuring continuity and genuine progress.
